title: Everything — all 26 chart kinds + sweeps
description: One tab per category. Every kind the catalog advertises, rendered from real generated data.

blocks.title: Signups vs target
blocks.description: Two series over an ordered axis. (line)

blocks.title: Traffic by device
blocks.description: Unstacked, so fills are translucent and overlap is visible. (area)

blocks.title: CPU
blocks.description: min/max are numbers, not data keys. (gauge)

blocks.text:
## Relations & flows — 5 kinds

`sankey` `graph` `radar` `parallel` `themeRiver`. `graph` and `themeRiver` have no Plotly trace — the skill renders them.

blocks.title: Service dependencies
blocks.description: Deterministic force layout, nodes sized by degree. (graph)

blocks.title: Topics over time
blocks.description: Symmetric streamgraph baseline; x must be real dates. (themeRiver)

blocks.text:
## Distributions & uncertainty — 3 kinds

`violin` `density` `errorBars`. **These are the ones ECharts structurally could not draw** under a JSON-only contract.

blocks.title: Latency distribution
blocks.description: KDE per group with an inner box. (violin)

blocks.title: Learning curve
blocks.description: Train vs validation, shaded ±1 std. (errorBars, band)

blocks.text:
## 3D & fields — 3 kinds

`scatter3d` `surface` `contour`. **Drag to rotate the 3D scenes.**

## Clustering — 3 kinds

`dendrogram` `silhouette` `splom`. The dendrogram consumes a scipy-style linkage where `"#i"` refers back to merge `i`.

blocks.title: Cluster quality
blocks.description: Sorted per cluster; dashed line = mean. Negative bars are misassigned samples. (silhouette)

blocks.text:
## Sweeps — a slider over precomputed frames

**Drag each slider.** Every frame was computed up front and shipped as plain rows. No code runs; nothing calls back into the agent.

blocks.title: Clustering as k varies
blocks.description: Same points, relabelled per k. (scatter + sweep)

blocks.title: Surface deforming with temperature
blocks.description: A 3D sweep — react reuses the WebGL context. (surface + sweep)
